title: Milka Cow
description: Add a chance for the most famous Swiss cow to spawn.
body:
Add a chance for the most famous Swiss cow to spawn.

Uses custom textures, so

    You'll need Entity Texture Feature if your on Fabric/Forge.
    Also CIT or Chime (optional) to display custom Name Tags
    Or to be used with Optifine.

Compatible with Fresh animation. Just go in the zip folder, remove **cow2.png** from **\assets\minecraft\optifine\random\entity\cow** and rename c**ow2 - Fresh Animation Compatible.png** in **cow2.png** to get eyes animations.

They have a tiny chance to appear in any biomes.
Chances are higher in all moutains relative biomes (except savanna windswept).
They have a huge chance to appear in meadows.

Anywhere you can get them by renaming them :

    Milka
    Swiss Chocolate
    Vach Mauve

Uses the new "supported_formats" tag in pack.mcmeta, but should work with any version of minecraft, ignore the warning message if the pack show red in the list.
